heading: Authority of FERC
label: 8322 Authority of FERC
text: Nothing in the Wall Street Transparency and Accountability Act of 2010 or the amendments to the Commodity Exchange Act [ et seq.] made by such Act shall limit or affect any statutory enforcement authority of the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission pursuant to and that existed prior to .7 U.S.C. 1section 824v of title 16section 717c–1 of this titleJuly 21, 2010
notes: References in TextThe Wall Street Transparency and Accountability Act of 2010, referred to in text, is title VII of , , , which enacted this chapter and enacted and amended numerous other sections and notes in the Code. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
